sentences.target: Il y a une ouverture nocturne au musée.
sentences.reading: /il i a yn uvɛʁtyʁ nɔk.tyʁn o myze/

translations.fr: Il y a une ouverture nocturne au musée.
translations.ipa: /il i a yn uvɛʁtyʁ nɔk.tyʁn o myze/
translations.en: There’s a night opening at the museum.
translations.es: Hay una apertura nocturna en el museo.
translations.de: Im Museum gibt es eine Abendöffnung.
translations.pt: Há uma abertura noturna no museu.
translations.vi: Bảo tàng có mở cửa ban đêm.
translations.nl: Er is een avondopenstelling in het museum.
translations.ro: Este o deschidere nocturnă la muzeu.
translations.ja: 博物館で夜間開館があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used as a dummy/expletive in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed existential expression 'il y a'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present of 'avoir' used in the existential pattern meaning 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article introducing a singular noun phrase.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase serving as the complement of the existential verb.
Adjective modifying 'ouverture'; feminine singular form agreeing with the noun.
Preposition (contraction of 'à' + 'le'); introduces the locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au' indicating location.

sentences.target: On prévoit une sortie nocturne demain.

translations.fr: On prévoit une sortie nocturne demain.
translations.en: We’re planning a night outing tomorrow.
translations.es: Estamos planeando una salida nocturna para mañana.
translations.de: Wir planen für morgen einen abendlichen Ausflug.
translations.it: Stiamo organizzando un'uscita serale per domani.
translations.ko: 우리는 내일 밤 나들이를 계획하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们计划明天晚上出去。
translations.yue: 我哋計劃聽日夜晚出去。
translations.ru: Мы планируем на завтра вечернюю прогулку.
translations.pt: Estamos planejando um passeio noturno para amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi dự định đi chơi buổi tối vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: We plannen voor morgen een avonduitje.
translations.uk: Ми плануємо на завтра вечірню прогулянку.
translations.hi: हम कल रात घूमने जाने की योजना बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σχεδιάζουμε μια βραδινή έξοδο για αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi planlegger en kveldstur i morgen.
translations.id: Kami merencanakan jalan-jalan malam untuk besok.
translations.sv: Vi planerar en kvällsutflykt i morgon.
translations.ro: Plănuim o ieșire de seară pentru mâine.
translations.da: Vi planlægger en aftenudflugt i morgen.
translations.ja: 私たちは明日の夜に出かける予定です。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object ('une sortie nocturne').
Indefinite article marking a singular noun phrase.
Common noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Adjective modifying 'sortie'; feminine singular agreeing with the noun.
Temporal adverb specifying when the planned action occurs.

sentences.target: Je prends parfois le bus nocturne.

translations.fr: Je prends parfois le bus nocturne.
translations.en: I sometimes take the night bus.
translations.es: A veces tomo el autobús nocturno.
translations.ru: Я иногда езжу на ночном автобусе.
translations.pt: Às vezes pego o ônibus noturno.
translations.vi: Thỉnh thoảng tôi đi xe buýt đêm.
translations.hi: मैं कभी-कभी रात की बस लेता हूँ.
translations.el: Μερικές φορές παίρνω το νυχτερινό λεωφορείο.
translations.ja: ときどき深夜バスに乗ります。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; governs the direct object 'le bus nocturne'.
Frequency adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Definite article introducing a specific noun.
Common noun; direct object of 'prends'.
Adjective post-modifying 'bus'; masculine singular form.

sentences.target: La piscine organise une soirée nocturne ce soir.
sentences.reading: /la pisin ɔʁganiz yn swaʁe nɔk.tyʁn sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: La piscine organise une soirée nocturne ce soir.
translations.ipa: /la pisin ɔʁganiz yn swaʁe nɔk.tyʁn sə swaʁ/
translations.en: The pool is hosting a night event tonight.
translations.es: La piscina organiza un evento nocturno esta noche.
translations.de: Das Schwimmbad veranstaltet heute Abend eine nächtliche Veranstaltung.
translations.it: La piscina organizza un evento notturno questa sera.
translations.ko: 수영장이 오늘 밤 야간 행사를 연다.
translations.zh-Hans: 游泳馆今晚举办夜间活动。
translations.yue: 泳池今晚舉辦夜間活動。
translations.ru: Бассейн сегодня вечером проводит ночное мероприятие.
translations.pt: A piscina está organizando um evento noturno hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Havuz bu akşam gece etkinliği düzenliyor.
translations.vi: Bể bơi tổ chức sự kiện ban đêm tối nay.
translations.nl: Het zwembad organiseert vanavond een nachtelijk evenement.
translations.uk: Басейн сьогодні ввечері проводить нічний захід.
translations.hu: Az uszoda ma este éjszakai rendezvényt tart.
translations.hi: स्विमिंग पूल आज रात एक रात्रिकालीन कार्यक्रम आयोजित कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Basen organizuje dziś wieczorem nocne wydarzenie.
translations.el: Η πισίνα διοργανώνει απόψε μια νυχτερινή εκδήλωση.
translations.nb: Svømmebassenget arrangerer et kveldsarrangement i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini kolam renang mengadakan acara malam.
translations.sv: Poolen anordnar ett kvällsevenemang i kväll.
translations.ro: Piscina organizează în această seară un eveniment nocturn.
translations.cs: Bazén pořádá dnes večer noční akci.
translations.da: Svømmehallen afholder et aftenarrangement i aften.
translations.ja: プールは今夜夜間イベントを開催します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular, introducing the subject noun.
Common noun; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a direct object ('une soirée nocturne').
Indefinite article introducing the object noun phrase.
Common noun; head of the direct object phrase (an event).
Adjective modifying 'soirée'; feminine singular agreeing with the noun.
Demonstrative determiner forming the time expression 'ce soir'.
Common noun; with 'ce' forms a temporal adjunct meaning 'this evening'.
